# Kitabomori

> Kitabomori is a volunteer educational publishing platform promoting a
> culture of reading and writing. In the Shina language, "kitab" means
> book and "mori" means conversation — the site publishes articles,
> book reviews, creative writing, letters, and teaching reflections
> aimed at researchers, students, teachers, policymakers, and general
> readers, encouraging thoughtful dialogue around education, culture,
> language, and human experience. Content is published bilingually in
> English and Urdu.

## Sections

- [Articles](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/articles/): Experience- and research-based opinion pieces with practical suggestions on reading, writing, and education.
- [Reviews](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/reviews/): Book reviews and critical takes on published works.
- [Creative Writing](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/creative-writing/): Original short stories, poetry, reflections, dialogues, satire, and nonfiction.
  - [Short Stories](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/creative-writing/short-stories/)
  - [Poetry](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/creative-writing/poetry/)
  - [Reflection](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/creative-writing/reflection/)
  - [Dialogues](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/creative-writing/dialogues/)
  - [Satire](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/creative-writing/satire/)
  - [Nonfiction](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/creative-writing/nonfiction/)
- [Letters](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/letters/): Personal letters from teachers, students, and researchers.
- [Teaching Diary](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/diary/): First-person reflections and journal entries from educators.
- [Events](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/events/): Announcements and write-ups of Kitabomori events and activities.

## Other languages

- Urdu edition (same sections, translated content): https://kitabomori.github.io/ur/

## Contributing

- [Submission guidelines](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/guidelines/): How to write for Kitabomori.
- [Submit writing](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/submission/): Where to send a submission.

## Optional

- [Sitemap (English)](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/sitemap.xml)
- [Sitemap (Urdu)](https://kitabomori.github.io/ur/sitemap.xml)
- [Privacy Policy](https://kitabomori.github.io/en/privacy/)
